name: Meggitt PLC
description: Meggitt PLC, now part of the Parker Aerospace Group following its 2022 acquisition by Parker-Hannifin, is a world-leading engineering company specializing in high-performance components and sub-systems for the aerospace, defence, and energy markets. The company provides critical technologies, including braking systems, sensors, engine components, and fire protection, which are utilized on a vast range of commercial and military aircraft, as well as in power generation and industrial applications. Headquartered in the United Kingdom, Meggitt is renowned for its commitment to innovation, sustainability, and engineering excellence, supporting customers throughout the entire lifecycle of their products.
